api_key.description: IP2WHOIS API key, sent as the 'key' query parameter on every lookup. Never logged.

domains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to look up (one WHOIS lookup per domain). A single domain is a length-1 list.

base_url.description: IP2WHOIS API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
